hero.title: Learn. Practice. Compete.
hero.lede: A curated set of platforms, guides, and tools to help you prepare for the Kenya Informatics Olympiad and beyond — from your first loop to your first IOI-style problem.

categories.name: Practice & online judges
categories.description: Where to solve problems and sharpen your speed.

links.title: Codeforces
links.description: Regular contests and a huge problem archive with editorials.

links.title: AtCoder
links.description: Beginner-friendly contests with clear difficulty progression.

links.title: USACO Guide
links.description: A structured, topic-by-topic path from Bronze to Platinum.

links.title: CP-Algorithms
links.description: Clear write-ups of the algorithms and data structures you'll need.

links.title: GitHub
links.description: Host your solutions, collaborate, and explore open-source projects.

links.title: KIO training track
links.description: How KIO trains and mentors shortlisted students.
